title: Allen Career Institute is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Allen Career Institute is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allen Career Institute family as a Subject Matter Expert in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allen Career Institute:
Allen Career Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute!
